creator: Various
description: Librivox recording of LIbriVox Short Nonfiction Collection Vol. 013 by Various Authors. Read by LibriVox Volunteers. A collection of sixteen short nonfiction works in the public domain. The essays, speeches and reports included in this collection were independently selected by the readers, and the topics encompass history, politics, medicine, nature and religion. (summary by J. M. Smallheer) For more free audiobooks, or to become a volunteer reader, please visit librivox.org . Download M4B (144mb)
